'''''Destreg Spaceport''''' was a [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Construction Corporation]] [[Golan Space Colony 2|Space Colony 2]] [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Destreg II]]. It catered to both transport and passenger services, with the emphasis on the latter, as the space station contained a number of resorts suitable for rest and relaxation. For example, even during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] the passenger liner ''[[Sea Sprite 1]]'' was still bringing tourists to the station.

[[K'Armyn Viraxo]] considered ''Destreg Spaceport'' to be an excellent venue for his [[Assassination attempt on K'Armyn Viraxo|ambush]] of the [[Azzameen family|Azzameen]] brothers [[Emon Azzameen|Emon]] and [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace]], as it would not be out of place for his private yacht, the ''[[Highroller]]'', to be visiting a luxury resort. Unfortunately for K'Armyn, Ace and Emon managed to defeat the ambush consisting of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and Two [[Muurian transport]]s called ''[[Tolarus]]'' and ''[[Vembri]]'' and escaping, destroying the ''Highroller'' in the process.

==Routes==
*[[C-3 passenger liner]] ''[[Sea Sprite 1]]''
*[[Star Galleon-class frigate]] ''[[Yar]]''
*6 [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] [[Aratech (freighter group)|''Aratech'']]
*3 [[Xiytiar-class heavy transport/Legends|Xiytiar-class transports]] [[Bebel Gas (Xiytiar-class transports)|''Bebel Gas'']]

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
